calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Dismiss The Arbitration Proceeding And, Or Terminating Sanctions Based On Fernando Barahonas Failure To Obey Courts Discovery Order
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Dismiss The Arbitration Proceeding And, Or Terminating Sanctions Based On Fernando Barahonas Failure To Obey Courts Discovery Order - The motion will be heard on the discovery calendar in department 301 at 9:00 a.m. on the same date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss The Arbitration Proceeding And, Or Terminating Sanctions Based On Fernando Barahonas Failure To Obey Courts Discovery Order
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christina Kim, of Law Offices of Gilsleider, McMahon, Molinelli & Phan, Tel. 925.446.3115, for Progressive Insurance Company;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed Motion To Dismiss The Arbitration Proceeding And, Or Terminating Sanctions Based On Fernando Barahonas Failure To Obey Courts Discovery Order is GRANTED. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Respondent, Defendant Fernando Barahonas Attendance At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY MARILOU R. BUTONERA OF GILSEIDER, MCMAHON, MOLINELLI AND PHAN TEL NO. 925-446-3113 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- PETITIONER PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Compelling Respondent, Defendant Fernando Barahonas Attendance At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions IS GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported. =302/JPT.
